arts.ttl: Exclusive: Jonathan David makes huge transfer decision amid Man United and Chelsea interest
arts.sum: Lille’s Jonathan David is at the centre of a heated transfer battle as top European clubs vie for his signature this summer – but it’s the Premier League he wants, CaughtOffside understands.
